name: Gateshead International Stadium
metaTitle: Gateshead International Stadium Track info & Wind Speed
metaDescription: Check the latest wind speed and stadium info for Gateshead International Stadium to optimise your track performance.

trackInfo.heading: Opening Times
trackInfo.text: Monday to Thursday 6.15am to 10pm, Friday 6.15am to 8pm, Saturday 8am to 6.30pm, Sunday 8am to 5.30pm

trackInfo.heading: Entry Price
trackInfo.text: Adults £5.60, Concessions £3.40. GO Gateshead members run for free.

trackInfo.heading: Parking Details
trackInfo.text: Free on-site parking available with ample spaces right next to the stadium entrance.

trackInfo.heading: Address
trackInfo.text: Gateshead International Stadium, Neilson Road, Gateshead, NE10 0EF
